快3靠谱计划【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239048293_64086020<br>vk.com/topic-239100468_64400399<br>vk.com/topic-239100485_63813374<br>vk.com/topic-239100470_64972969<br>vk.com/topic-239100533_64086033<br>vk.com/topic-239100482_64513934<br>vk.com/topic-239100532_64513940<br>vk.com/topic-239100466_64234164<br>vk.com/topic-239100560_64973025<br>vk.com/topic-239100570_64973036<br>vk.com/topic-239084240_64973048<br>vk.com/topic-239096662_64514021<br>vk.com/topic-239100500_64973064<br>vk.com/topic-239100573_64086116<br>vk.com/topic-239100566_64234311<br>vk.com/topic-239100578_64400521<br>vk.com/topic-239100572_64514071<br>vk.com/topic-239100606_64234346<br>vk.com/topic-239079469_64671177<br>vk.com/topic-239100509_64671204<br>vk.com/topic-239100479_64671212<br>vk.com/topic-239100486_64234377<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65551268<br>vk.com/topic-239100488_64400588<br>vk.com/topic-239100476_64234405<br>vk.com/topic-239100518_64400600<br>vk.com/topic-239100464_63897426<br>vk.com/topic-239100521_65551289<br>vk.com/topic-239100524_63897434<br>vk.com/topic-239100455_63813605<br>vk.com/topic-239100496_64234416<br>vk.com/topic-239100459_64671252<br>vk.com/topic-239100458_64400632<br>vk.com/topic-
